title: More custom blocks
description:
In the moment one additional block is added: "Railjet" 
It is used to print a Logo on Create Trains!
body:
🚄 Railjet Logo Block - Create Trains Add-on
Looking to add a touch of authenticity to your rail fleet? This compact add-on introduces the Railjet Block to your Create mod world!

This single, specialized block is designed to be used with Create Trains, allowing you to easily print the iconic Railjet logo directly onto your custom train builds. Give your locomotives and carriages a professional, branded look and make your creations stand out on the tracks.
